name: Sustain or suppress a spell you have cast whose level is less than or equal to the level + 2 magnitudes of the Vim spell. (see desc)

system.baseEffectDescription:
This, and the similar guidelines below, cannot make a spell last longer than it could have naturally, and so the sustaining version is only useful with Concentration Duration, among the standard Hermetic Durations. Similarly, a spell that has been suppressed still ends when its original duration expires.

Examples of specific types include Hermetic Terram magic and Shamanic spirit control magic [and curse magic].
